subject: Contoso SAML SSO certificate rollover caused all-employee login outage
summary: Contoso rotated the Okta IdP certificate and all employees saw SAML signature validation errors.
cause: New IdP metadata was uploaded, but AcmeDesk's cached IdP certificate was not refreshed for the tenant.
resolution: Identity team forced a metadata refresh, verified the new certificate fingerprint, and documented the customer-facing workaround.

subject: SAML audience mismatch after vanity domain change
summary: Umbrella Health users failed SAML login after switching to a vanity domain.
cause: IdP audience URI still pointed to the old AcmeDesk tenant URL.
resolution: Updated IdP audience URI and verified SP entity ID.
